name: Soyuz 7K-OK
tagline: First Soyuz generation; Komarov's fatal flight
description: The first generation of Soyuz, with all the architectural choices that have endured for sixty years: orbital module sphere, descent module, service module with deployable solar arrays. Tragically introduced by Soyuz 1 (Komarov’s fatal flight, 1967).
best_known_for: First Soyuz generation; Komarov's fatal flight
